  "findings": [
    "Wheel alignment performed without performing the required ADAS recalibration",
    "Non-compliance with OEM position statements regarding safety-critical sensor calibration after suspension geometry changes"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the vehicle release process immediately",
    "Perform the required static and/or dynamic ADAS recalibrations per OEM specifications",
    "Verify calibration success with a post-repair diagnostic scan and document the results"
  ],
  "rationale": "Performing a wheel alignment alters the vehicle's thrust angle and steering centerline. Failing to recalibrate ADAS sensors (such as forward-facing cameras and radar) after an alignment violates OEM position statements, introduces critical safety risks such as unintended braking or lane-keep assist errors, and renders the vehicle non-compliant.",

    "OEM Position Statements on ADAS Calibration",
    "I-CAR Calibration Requirements after Wheel Alignment"
  ]
